stories.title: Setup Vector Database and Document Loader
stories.description: Initialize a local ChromaDB instance and write a data ingestion script to load the scraped `data/shl_catalog.json` items into LangChain Document objects.

stories.title: Implement Embedding Generation
stories.description: Configure the `sentence-transformers` library (e.g., `all-MiniLM-L6-v2`) to generate embeddings for the SHL catalog documents and bulk insert them into the ChromaDB collection.

stories.title: Connect Gemini LLM via LangChain
stories.description: Set up the LangChain `ChatGoogleGenerativeAI` wrapper using the `GOOGLE_API_KEY` from the environment `.env` file.

stories.title: Develop RAG Retrieval Chain
stories.description: Create a LangChain Retrieval QA chain that uses the ChromaDB retriever to pull the top K most relevant catalog items, feeding them into the Gemini LLM to answer user queries.
